_doc: Ashby tenants whose application form is inlined on the tenant's own public website (so the standard captcha wall on jobs.ashbyhq.com/<tenant>/<id>/application can be bypassed). Source of truth for inline_submit._ashby_tenant_embed_fallback. To qualify a tenant: (a) GraphQL ApiOrganizationFromHostedJobsPageName returns publicWebsite, (b) <publicWebsite>/<slug_template> renders the Ashby form widgets in-page (#_systemfield_resume present, file input count >= 1), (c) NO recaptcha/hcaptcha/turnstile globals or scripts on the rendered page. Verify with role-discovery/sweep_ashby_tenant_embeds.py before adding.

_slug_modes.role_slug: Use the slugified role title, e.g. 'Forward Deployed Engineer' -> 'forward-deployed-engineer'. Some tenants (Cursor) use this pattern.
_slug_modes.job_id: Use the Ashby job UUID directly in the URL path.
_slug_modes.custom: Slug is recorded per-role in tracker.agent_notes as 'embed_slug:<value>'.

cursor.verified_via: chain_018/019 (2 live submits) + sweep CDP probe 2026-05-30
cursor.notes: First production tenant for the embed fallback. Use snapshot refs=aria selector='#_systemfield_resume' to get button ref, then browser.upload inputRef=<ref> paths=[...] (NOT selector= — TOOLS.md chain_019 note).

_sweep_history.summary: Of the 31 captcha-walled Ashby tenants from chain_027 (anrok, artisan, assorthealth, blacksmith, brainco, braintrust, brellium, brettonai, claylabs, coframe, console, depthfirst, distyl, dust, eliseai, fluency, fonoa, happyrobot.ai, hcompany, higharc, lancedb, liquid-ai, moment, notion, picogrid, plain, restate, snowflake, speak, tessera-labs, thought-machine): 3 had a tenant-domain JD page that returned HTTP 200 (braintrust, moment, picogrid), but ALL THREE just link out to jobs.ashbyhq.com/<tenant>/<id>/application for the actual form. ZERO inlined-form embeds found. Cursor remains the only known tenant in this pattern.
